untranslatable_reason: zscore_last is not in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. This is a pairs trading signal requiring cointegration analysis and z-score calculation, which are not available in the standard indicator set. The hedge_ratio parameter is also derived from cointegration analysis.
translation_notes: Signal is for pairs trading mean reversion. Entry triggers on extreme z-scores (±1.5), exit when z-score reverts toward mean (±0.25 band). Direction is context-dependent based on which leg of the pair is overbought/oversold. Cannot be fully translated without zscore_last indicator.
